name: Amvis Holdings, Inc.
summary: Amvis Holdings, Inc. provides medical and nursing care services in Japan. It operates medical centers in Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Yamagata, Ibaraki, Tochigi, Saitama, Tokyo, Kanagawa, Niigata, Gifu, and Aichi. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
